overall.description: First-person skiing gameplay descending a steep snow-covered mountain slope under clear blue skies. The player navigates through pristine alpine terrain with high-quality snow physics, revealing expansive glacial valleys and distant mountain ranges. PlayStation controller UI (L2/R2 prompts) visible at bottom of screen confirms this is video game footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snow-covered mountain slope with clear sky

agents.ego_description: skiing rapidly down a steep snow-covered slope with snow spray visible at the edges of the frame

entered.detail: steep white snow-covered slope with texture and shadows filling the lower frame
deep blue cloudless sky occupying the upper half of the frame
snowy mountain ridge line forming the horizon on the right side
streaks of blue-tinted ice visible within the white snow

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a high-speed first-person descent down a steep alpine slope. The frame is dominated by white snow with blue ice patches and a clear blue sky above. The snow crest ridge remains visible on the right horizon as the skier maintains a rapid straight trajectory down the mountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain slope with distant rocky peaks visible to the left

events.description: distant snow-capped mountain range comes into view on the left as the descent continues

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed down the slope while the terrain opens up to reveal mountain scenery on the left

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky mountains with sharp peaks visible in the distance on the left
exposed dark rock faces on the mountainside contrasting with white snow

segments.scene_description: As the skier continues descending, the scene opens to reveal a dramatic mountain range on the left with rocky cliff faces and snow-capped peaks. The snow crest ridge on the right moves closer to the mid-ground while the skier maintains rapid forward motion down the pristine slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive glacial valley with panoramic mountain vista

events.description: view opens to reveal wide glacial valley and expansive mountain panorama as camera pans left
camera slows slightly to pan across the panoramic mountain vista before continuing descent

agents.ego_description: slowing to pan left and take in the expansive mountain valley view before resuming the descent

entered.detail: wide snow-filled valley between mountain ranges with undulating snow drifts
distant jagged mountain peaks forming a continuous skyline across the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a breathtaking panoramic view of a vast glacial valley surrounded by mountain peaks. The camera pans left to showcase the expansive vista, with the snow slope now visible on the right and the distant mountain range dominating the center frame. The skier appears to slow momentarily to observe the scenery before continuing the descent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed first-person descent down a steep alpine slope that gradually opens into a breathtaking panoramic vista of a glacial valley. It begins with a rapid straight trajectory down a white expanse marked by blue ice patches, with a snow crest ridge lining the right horizon under a clear blue sky. As the skier continues the descent, the environment expands to reveal dramatic rocky cliff faces and snow-capped peaks emerging on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera pans left, transitioning from the narrow slope to a vast view of a glacial valley surrounded by towering mountain ranges. Finally, the skier slows momentarily to observe the expansive scenery before resuming the descent into the valley.
